questionHtml: Addiction may be affected by social environment. Outline one other named factor that can affect addiction to drugs.
markschemeHtml:
EITHER

a. genetic predisposition 

b. metabolic/enzyme differences (e.g. in processing of alcohol) 

OR

a. dopamine secretion 

b. addictive drugs trigger (higher) secretion/extracellular levels of dopamine (which causes positive effect on mood)

meta.title: Addiction may be affected by social environment. Outline one other named factor that can affect addiction to drugs.
